reasoning: Stavroula Tsolakidou's March 2026 FIDE rating was 2479. To be 1% higher on the April 2026 list, she would need to gain ~25 rating points to reach 2504. Because she is an established player above 2400, her FIDE K-factor is 10. Gaining 25 rating points in a single month would require outperforming her expected score by 2.5 points, which is mathematically very difficult and corresponds to a dominant tournament performance (e.g., scoring 7.5/10 against ~2500 rated opposition). I searched the web for any indication of her playing classical chess tournaments in late February or March 2026 and scoring exceptionally well over this period, and there are absolutely no news stories or results to indicate she played such a tournament. Without any evidence of a massive performance recently, the probability of her classical rating jumping by 25 points or more on the April 2026 FIDE list is extremely low.
